A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step (function-call-7106898029727189264) incorrectly identified 2016 ‘physical activity’ papers by simply checking if the full text contained the substrings “2016” and “physical activity,” leading to two wrong titles that were then used to sum citations in the subsequent SQL query (function-call-16701435435175280417), thus producing an incorrect final answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
